primary_accounting_issue: Déterminer la signification du critère « solely payments of principal and interest » et les modèles de classement IFRS 9 auxquels ce critère donne accès pour un actif financier

authority_resolution.selection_reason: IFRS 9 is the single governing standard in the provided context for the classification of financial assets and the SPPI contractual cash flow test, and no overlapping lower- or higher-precedence document competes with it.
authority_resolution.residual_uncertainty: Low uncertainty because the question directly concerns the IFRS 9 contractual cash flow criterion and the context includes the operative classification and application guidance paragraphs.

primary_authority.reason: These paragraphs directly define the SPPI test and the resulting IFRS 9 classification models for financial assets.

supporting_authority.reason: This agenda decision supports the SPPI analysis by clarifying that denomination and currency-related cash flow features can be relevant to the contractual cash flow assessment.

peripheral_authority.reason: These derecognition paragraphs are topically related to financial assets but do not help identify peer classification approaches for the SPPI issue.
These paragraphs address the fair value option and equity-instrument presentation election, which are distinct issues from defining an SPPI financial asset.

treatment_families.family: Financial assets that meet the contractual cash flow criterion and are held in a hold-to-collect business model
Financial assets that meet the contractual cash flow criterion and are held in a collect-and-sell business model
Financial assets that do not fall into the SPPI-based measurement categories

approaches.label: Amortised cost
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 identifies amortised cost as a top-level subsequent measurement model for financial assets whose contractual cash flows are solely payments of principal and interest and that are held to collect those cash flows.

approaches.label: Fair value through other comprehensive income
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 identifies fair value through other comprehensive income as a separate top-level subsequent measurement model for financial assets that meet the SPPI criterion and are managed both to collect cash flows and to sell.

approaches.label: Fair value through profit or loss
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 identifies fair value through profit or loss as the residual top-level subsequent measurement model, including for financial assets whose contractual cash flows are not solely payments of principal and interest.
